description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly matte black exterior and a slightly weathered appearance. The front features a large, frosted glass display window, bordered by a metal frame, with the word 'PUSH' prominently displayed below it. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel containing a series of metallic buttons, a coin slot, a bill acceptor, and a product retrieval slot marked 'PULL'. The sides of the machine are plain black, adorned with graffiti-style tags in white and gray, adding to its urban character. The top and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The machine appears robust and heavy, suitable for placement in public urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A matte black, weathered vending machine with a frosted glass display, metallic control panel, and graffiti on the sides.
description_view_0: The back of the vending machine, solid matte black with no visible features or markings.
description_view_1: The left side of the vending machine, matte black with two graffiti tags in white and gray.
description_view_2: The front of the vending machine, featuring a frosted glass display, control panel with buttons, payment slots, and 'PUSH' and 'PULL' signage.
description_view_3: The right side of the vending machine, similar to the left, with graffiti tags and a plain matte black finish.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front, featuring a frosted glass window and a small illuminated area above the buttons.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot and a bill acceptor, both located on the right side of the front control panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are several metallic product selection buttons arranged vertically on the right side of the front panel, each individually labeled.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower right of the front panel, marked with the word 'PULL'.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The word 'PUSH' is prominently displayed in white on the lower part of the glass window; graffiti tags in white and gray are present on both sides.
